ticket-booking-system.overview: An end-to-end cinema ticket booking platform — customers browse movies and showtimes, select seats on a live seat map, confirm bookings with distributed locking, and receive QR-coded digital tickets via email. Admins manage cinemas, screens, movies, showtimes, bookings, and audit logs from a full dashboard.

highlights.title: Customer experience
highlights.subtitle: Vue 3 · TypeScript · Tailwind CSS
bullets: Browse cinemas, movies, and showtimes with Now Showing / Coming Soon
Interactive seat map with WebSocket live updates (held, released, sold)
Checkout with Redis seat holds (5-min TTL) and idempotent booking confirm
My Bookings, digital QR tickets, and bilingual EN/TH UI

highlights.title: Backend API
highlights.subtitle: Go · Gin · MongoDB · Redis
bullets: REST endpoints for catalog, holds, confirm, and admin CRUD
WebSocket hub with Redis pub/sub for multi-instance seat map fan-out
Redis locking strategy to prevent double-booking under concurrent load
JWT + Google OAuth auth with role-based admin access

highlights.title: Async & infrastructure
highlights.subtitle: asynq · Brevo · Docker Compose
bullets: Background email delivery with asynq worker and Brevo API
Audit logs and email delivery tracking for admin support
Docker Compose stack with nginx, API, worker, MongoDB, and Redis
GitHub Actions CI for Go tests and Vue lint/type-check/build

ticket-booking-system.role: Sole developer — architecture, full-stack implementation, and deployment.

screenshots.alt: Cinema ticket booking system architecture diagram
screenshots.caption: System architecture

screenshots.alt: Redis seat hold and confirm lock strategy
screenshots.caption: Redis lock strategy

spaceshare.overview: SpaceShare connects B2B shippers with inter-province drivers who already have spare capacity on a planned trip. Three products — a driver mobile app, a company web app, and a shared API — built around one idea: drivers pick the packages on their route, no auto-matching.

highlights.title: Mobile app
highlights.subtitle: Drivers · Expo + React Native
bullets: Plan routes with time, capacity, and max deviation
Browse on-route packages, pick, and deliver with proof

highlights.title: Web app
highlights.subtitle: Companies & admins · Next.js + TypeScript
bullets: Create and track shipments with team roles
Status updates, notifications, and verification

highlights.title: Backend API
highlights.subtitle: Go · PostgreSQL · Redis
bullets: Route-deviation package matching with PostGIS
Capacity checks, status timeline, JWT auth

highlights.title: Status
highlights.subtitle: Pre-launch · pilot-ready
bullets: Core loop live on all three surfaces
Private repo — full walkthrough in the demo video

spaceshare.role: Project Manager — owned scope, specs, and delivery across all three surfaces, keeping the team aligned on the driver-selected model.

my-portfolio.overview: The site you're browsing — an immersive static Next.js app with Framer Motion and Three.js, deployed to GitHub Pages.
highlights: Immersive 3D hero built with Three.js / React Three Fiber
Framer Motion scroll and hover animations throughout
JSON-driven content — add projects without touching layout code
Static export with basePath-aware assets for GitHub Pages
my-portfolio.role: Sole developer — design, build, and deployment.

figure-shop.overview: A full-stack marketplace for collectible figures — an Express + MongoDB REST API behind an EJS storefront and admin dashboard.
highlights: Session auth with bcrypt hashing
Catalog with image uploads and scheduled discounts
Cart, orders, and payments for the full checkout flow
Sales analytics and admin CRUD dashboards
One-command setup with Docker Compose
figure-shop.role: Full-stack developer — API design, backend and frontend, Docker deployment.

asal.overview: An online TTRPG platform built in Unity — create characters, roll dice, fight, and adventure together in real time, with Firebase powering auth and live game state.
highlights: Character creation with class, race, and abilities
Virtual dice and strategic combat
Map and scenario tools for Dungeon Masters
Realtime multiplayer with in-game chat
Firebase Auth + Realtime Database persistence
asal.role: Backend-focused — designed Firebase schemas and built C# services syncing live gameplay data.

wifi-authentication-attack.overview: A controlled-lab simulation of real Wi-Fi attack workflows — WPA/WPA2 handshake capture, deauth, Hashcat cracking, and an Evil Twin captive portal — all behind one interactive Bash menu on Kali Linux.
highlights: Interactive menu for monitor mode, scanning, and attacks
Handshake capture with `.cap` → `.22000` conversion for Hashcat
Targeted (`aireplay-ng`) and broadcast (`mdk4`) deauth
Wordlist, rule-based, and mask cracking pipelines
Evil Twin stack: `hostapd` + `dnsmasq` + Flask captive portal
wifi-authentication-attack.role: Sole developer — Bash orchestration, captive portal, and lab documentation.
wifi-authentication-attack.disclaimer: For educational and research purposes only. Never use on networks you don't own or lack explicit permission to test.

pacman-fpga.overview: A complete Pac-Man–style game written in Verilog for the Artix-7 (Basys 3) — 640×480 VGA output, animated ghosts, scoring, lives, and a ready-to-build Vivado project.
highlights: 640×480@60 Hz VGA pipeline with layered sprites
Pac-Man FSM with wall avoidance and directional sprites
Two autonomous ghosts with collision detection
Respawning collectibles and 4-digit scoring
Full game loop: start → play → hit → game over → restart
pacman-fpga.role: Hardware developer — top-level integration, sprite ROMs, FSMs, and collision logic, validated on Basys 3.

moded.overview: The capstone full-stack platform for CPE494 at KMUTT — 30+ students shipping modules on a shared Go + PostgreSQL codebase. I owned the HR module.
highlights: Employee data model and leave-approval workflows
Integration hooks into the shared platform APIs
Team Dev Container workflow (Docker, Go, Postgres)
Collaboration at scale on a 30+ contributor monorepo
moded.role: HR module lead — domain model, backend, and UI integration.
